James P. Nevin, Esq. for plaintiff and moving party: Sam Hales
Peter B. Loban, Esq. for defendant and opposing party: Dayton Electric Manufacturing company

HEARING HELD and tentative ruling adopted with modification: Plaintiff Sam Hales's motion to compel defendant Dayton Electric Manufacturing Company to produce persons with knowledge is granted in part. Defendant is ordered to produce PMK to testify as to any records of Dayton Electric Manufacturing, or any records related to said defendant, encompassed by the prior order. Grainger's records manager is the appropriate person, PMK shall be produced for deposition within 10 days of notice of this order. As to further testimony concerning W. W. Grainger, counsel for plaintiff will have to issue deposition subpoenas. All requests for monetary sanctions are denied.
